mapper.insert: insert into util_card_type_log (card_type_id, operation_type, before_data, after_data, operator_id, operator, remark, created_at) values (#{cardTypeId}, #{operationType}, #{beforeData}, #{afterData}, #{operatorId}, #{operator}, #{remark}, now())
mapper.select: select * from util_card_type_log where card_type_id = #{cardTypeId} order by created_at desc
